allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,re; txt=sys.stdin.read\(\); m=re.search\(r'\\"message\\":\\"\(.*?\)\(?:\\\\\\\\n|\\"\)', txt\); print\(m.group\(1\) if m else txt[:500]\)")
